---
title: "System Status"
---

<img src="images/main_logo.png" class="centered-image">

## Current Status

⚠️ **NOT OPERATIONAL** as under development

Since: 23 May 2026

---

## System Details

- Node: GB7CAM  
- Mode: AX.25 / LINBPQ  
- Frequency: 144.950 MHz  

---

## Operational History

- Database entry: 23-May-2026  
- Next review: 23-Jul-2028
